scripts.setup-types:v13: rm -rf .typo3-core-types && git clone --depth 1 --filter=blob:none --sparse --branch 13.4 https://github.com/TYPO3/typo3.git .typo3-core-types && cd .typo3-core-types && git sparse-checkout set Build/Sources/TypeScript Build/types
scripts.setup-types:v14: rm -rf .typo3-core-types && git clone --depth 1 --filter=blob:none --sparse --branch 14.3 https://github.com/TYPO3/typo3.git .typo3-core-types && cd .typo3-core-types && git sparse-checkout set Build/Sources/TypeScript Build/types
scripts.prepare-types:v13: npm run setup-types:v13 && npm run generate-dts
scripts.prepare-types:v14: npm run setup-types:v14 && npm run generate-dts
